content: The 'depth unknown' foundational ambiguity around the core definition of a general agent can be reframed as an implicit curiosity signal for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, driving them to actively explore and iteratively refine their own working definition of what an agent is, rather than relying on static human-given definitions. This turns the open philosophical ambiguity of the core concept into a self-improving loop for agent memory itself.
